description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Workflow that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple environments including ubuntu-18.04 with gcc-8, gcc-9, clang-6, clang-9, and macos-10.15 with gcc-9 and clang-9. For each environment, check out the repository, compile with make, run unit tests and examples, and upload code coverage to Codecov.
